historical_period_text: Unless mentioned otherwise, all information is requested for fiscal years 2023, 2024, 2025, and YTD Mar-26, plus the corresponding YTD Mar-25 period.

items.request_text: Revenue transaction level database - Please provide a monthly transaction level revenue ledger for the historical periods.
items.kpmg_comment: Use this to bridge recurring revenue by stream.

items.request_text: MRR by customer by product by revenue stream - Please provide MRR by customer by product by revenue stream monthly for the historical period.
Renewal rate analysis - Please provide internal renewal rate analysis from both a dollar and logo perspective.
